text: Artificial intelligence, or AI, refers to the ability of machines to perform tasks that normally require human intelligence. This includes learning, problem-solving, and recognising patterns. One important area of AI is machine learning, where computers improve their performance by analysing data instead of being explicitly programmed. A more advanced part of machine learning is deep learning, which uses layers of neural networks to process complex information, like images or speech. You likely encounter AI in daily life—for example, when streaming services recommend shows, virtual assistants answer questions, or smart cameras detect faces. As AI continues to evolve, it will become even more integrated into our everyday activities.
